description_long: This is a large, dark wood filing cabinet with a modern, angular design and a rich brown finish. The front features four horizontal drawers on the left and a wide open shelf on the right, above which is a glass or acrylic pull-out tray. The top surface is broad and flat, suitable for placing office items or equipment. The rear panel is decorated with a textured gold surface and a central circular medallion, adding a touch of elegance. The sides are plain, showing the wood grain pattern, and the base is slightly recessed with a lighter brown accent. The overall construction suggests a sturdy, functional piece suitable for organizing documents and supplies in a professional setting.
description: A large, dark wood filing cabinet with four drawers, an open shelf, and a glass pull-out tray, featuring a decorative gold rear panel and a broad top surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing four drawers, an open shelf, and a glass pull-out tray on the right.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the plain wood grain side panel and the recessed base.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the gold textured panel with a central medallion and the lighter brown base accent.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the plain wood grain side and a partial view of the glass pull-out tray.
